title: X-tra Crispy Thai Chicken Kao Mun Gai
description: A northern Thai dish featuring chicken, served in a flavorful stock with crispy skin and a hint of spice. This hangover-cure breakfast dish is sure to satisfy.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chicken, coconut milk, fish sauce, palm sugar, red chilli powder, black pepper, ginger, and garlic. Mix well and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the marinated chicken on it.
Bake the chicken for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, prepare the stock by combining chicken stock, water, and toasted rice in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Once the chicken is cooked, remove it from the oven and brush with cornstarch to achieve crispy skin.
Place the chicken under the broiler for 2-3 minutes or until the skin is golden brown and crispy.
To serve, place the chicken on a plate and spoon the hot stock over it. Garnish with chopped Thai basil leaves and serve immediately.
